recommendations.title: My Bloody Valentine
recommendations.overview: Ten years after a Valentine's Day tragedy claimed the lives of five miners, Harry Warden returns for a vengeful massacre among teen sweethearts gearing up for another party.

recommendations.title: Three Colors: Red
recommendations.overview: Part-time model Valentine unexpectedly befriends a retired judge after she runs over his dog. At first, the grumpy man shows no concern about the dog, and Valentine decides to keep it. But the two form a bond when she returns to his house and catches

recommendations.title: The Thing About Harry
recommendations.overview: Two high school enemies, uber-jock Harry and out-and-proud Sam, are forced to share a car ride to their Missouri hometown for a friend's engagement party on Valentine's Day. Things take a turn when Sam learns Harry has come out.

recommendations.title: Virus: 32
recommendations.overview: A virus is unleashed and a chilling massacre runs through the streets of Montevideo.

recommendations.title: The Wailer
recommendations.overview: On their way to Mexico, six students are stranded in a small town where years before a tragedy took place.

recommendations.title: Atacama's 33
recommendations.overview: A team of Chilean miners are trapped underground for months and hold out for a miraculous rescue.

recommendations.title: Valentine
recommendations.overview: Four friends start to receive morbid Valentine cards and realise they are being stalked by someone they had spurned 13 years ago. A masked killer is on the loose and Valentine's day is soon approaching.

recommendations.title: Ring 0
recommendations.overview: Taking place thirty years before the events of Ringu, Ringu 0 provides the shocking background story of how the girl on the video became a deadly, vengeful spirit.

recommendations.title: ChromeSkull: Laid to Rest 2
recommendations.overview: After his gruesome encounter with a girl, and being outmatched by his own assistant, ChromeSkull resurges with a horrifying massacre of his own.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.
